name: io.github.theshajha/wovo
description: Deploy any HTML from any AI tool to a versioned, shareable library on wovo.dev; manage those pages and custom domains.

environmentVariables.name: WOVO_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Workspace deploy token (wv_…) from wovo.dev settings.

environmentVariables.name: WOVO_WORKSPACE
environmentVariables.description: Target workspace slug (optional; the token resolves a default).
